test.command: cd "/home/kratos/projects/TradingAgents-CN" && .venv-mission/bin/python -m pytest tests/services/test_watch_api_baseline.py tests/services/test_watch_digest_service.py tests/services/test_mini_auth_session_boundary.py -v && npm --prefix mini run test

blockingIssues.description: mini/lib/manual-upload-preflight.js only verifies that .gitignore mentions local-only WeChat paths, so preflight still passes if private artifacts like mini/project.private.config.json, mini/config/runtime.local.js, or mini/upload-secrets/* are already tracked.

mini/lib/wechat-ci-upload.js requires miniprogram-ci for the live path, but mini/package.json and mini/package-lock.json do not declare that dependency, so the scaffold cannot become activatable on a clean checkout even after operators inject the documented secrets and metadata.

appliedUpdates.description: Added the repo-owned `mini_preflight` command so future workers can discover the manual upload preflight from .factory/services.yaml.
Documented that the repo-wide `data/` ignore rule also matches `mini/data/*`, so checked-in Mini source/helpers should live elsewhere unless ignore patterns are adjusted intentionally.
